description_long: This object consists of three distinct residential buildings arranged side by side, each separated by fences and featuring private yards. The leftmost house is a compact, single-story structure with a sloped roof and a driveway leading to a garage. The central house is a two-story building with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious backyard that includes a patio and a pool. The rightmost building is a modern, two-story structure with a flat roof, rooftop amenities, and a shaded outdoor seating area. Trees and greenery are integrated into the yards, providing a suburban neighborhood feel. The buildings are primarily finished in neutral tones, with white and gray exteriors dominating the palette. The overall layout suggests a small residential block or a set of adjacent urban homes.
description: A group of three modern residential houses with private yards, flat and sloped roofs, and neutral-colored exteriors, arranged side by side in a suburban layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facades of all three houses, with visible windows, doors, and fenced yards.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the properties, backyards, and the presence of a pool and outdoor amenities.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying patios, outdoor seating, and the open backyard spaces behind each house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the driveways, garages, and the arrangement of trees and green spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryways with standard doors, some with small porches or steps, and minimal decorative elements
